methods.name: featurestoresdk.singleton_manager.SingletonManager.config
documentation: This functions returns sdk configuration in dictionary.

This class is used to get sdk configuration and logger.
Simplified Singleton implementation.
Thread safety not considered, only reading from the instance after creation.

methods.name: featurestoresdk.feature_store_sdk.FeatureStoreSdk.get_feature_store_pwd
documentation: This function would retrieve feature-store-password from kubernetes secrets

methods.name: featurestoresdk.feature_store_sdk.FeatureStoreSdk.get_features
documentation:
This function returns pandas dataframe containing data.
            Special handle for features containing empty spaces and special character
            The db driver replaces empty spaces with _ and removes special characters in
            the result dataset, So we query those spaced features in different db query and
            maintain the original feature name
args:
    trainingjob_name: collection name from where we take data in feature store
    features: list of strings indicating features
return value:
    panda dataframe containing data

methods.name: featurestoresdk.feature_store_sdk.FeatureStoreSdk.build_fetch_query
documentation: Builds simple sql query for given table and features list

methods.name: featurestoresdk.feature_store_sdk.FeatureStoreSdk.build_fetch_query_single
documentation: Builds simple sql query for given table and single feature
